description: 5e-bits.github.io publishes documentation for the D&D 5e SRD API, a read-only database of Dungeons & Dragons 5th Edition SRD content. The service exposes REST and GraphQL interfaces for querying game data such as monsters, spells, classes, and rules.
summary: Public D&D 5e SRD data service with one unauthenticated REST API and one unauthenticated GraphQL endpoint.
